name: slack
description: Slack in Claude — channels, messages, users, and search via MCP

slack_token.title: Slack OAuth token
slack_token.description: Bot token (xoxb-…) or user token (xoxp-…). Create a Slack app at api.slack.com/apps, add scopes, install it to your workspace, and copy the OAuth token. Stored in the OS keychain, not in settings.json.

cache_ttl.title: Name-cache TTL (seconds)
cache_ttl.description: How long resolved user names are cached before rebuilding. Default 3600 (1 hour); 0 never expires. Leave blank for the default.
